title: Closing the Gap: Parametric Insurance for a Volatile World
body:
Closing the Gap: Parametric Insurance for a Volatile World

Gain a clear understanding of parametric insurance: how index triggers are defined, verified, and paid; how it complements indemnity policies; and how to communicate basis risk. Examine market drivers, policy anatomy, and regulatory considerations. Explore real applications including NYC pilots, ag, microinsurance, travel delay, cyber outages, and renewable energy. Understand the role of satellites, sensors, and third-party data, practical payout formulas, and strategies to reduce mismatch risk, with examples across municipalities, SMEs, and global programs.

Pricing
$49.00*		Webinar Duration
60 minutes		CE Requirements
Verify your state and license CE requirements

*Enjoy Every Webinar Free with CEU Unlimited —  See Below to learn more.
No discount code or pre-paid agreement needed. No hidden or state reporting fees.

Webinar Details

Closing the Gap: Parametric Insurance for a Volatile World

Parametric coverage pays when the index says so, not after months of adjusting. Explore the mechanics, the pitfalls, and the real programs reshaping catastrophe and specialty coverage.

Topics

  • Explore market drivers, from climate volatility and reinsurance costs to the protection gap.
  • Examine triggers, thresholds, and payout formulas using reliable third-party data.
  • Understand basis risk and apply communication strategies that manage expectations.
  • Compare parametric speed and simplicity with indemnity claims handling to spot fit.
  • Learn where adoption is growing across flood, agriculture, travel delay, cyber, and renewable energy.
